results.title: LOOVA Studio Reviews | View Portfolios | DesignRush
results.content: > We signed a contract with Loova Studio (Lenka Loová) on April 30, 2025, for full branding delivery (logo, visual identity, brand book).What actually happened:Only partial outputs (research, strategy, moodboards) were delivered, and these did not reflect our assignment or the repeatedly provided feedback. Key requirements defined in the briefing were ignored, the logo and final identity were never delivered. During a video call on June 9, 2025, the supplier admitted she did not know how to implement our vision and suggested ending the cooperation while keeping the initial payment.We filed a formal complaint on June 24-25, 2025, since the outputs were unusable and did not meet the contractual requirements. The complaint was not acknowledged.The contract was drafted unilaterally in favor [...] acknowledged.The contract was drafted unilaterally in favor of the supplier. Under her interpretation, she is entitled to payment even if the results are not in line with the assignment and cannot be used by the client. This means client satisfaction and usability of the results are irrelevant.Financial impact: we paid an advance of 1,035 EUR. The supplier kept 869.40 EUR for partial phases. We considered it fair to leave her 250-300 for the work done, but this was rejected. In the end, only 165.60 EUR was refunded. After almost two months (around 35-40 working days), no usable branding was delivered, and a new designer had to start from scratch.The cooperation ended with no tangible results, a rejected complaint, and a contract that allowed the supplier to keep most of the advance [...] that allowed the supplier to keep most of the advance regardless of outcome.We do not recommend working with this studio and with Ms. Lenka Loová.Martin Tóth, CEOwww.pikMenu.com "

results.title: Loova AI: Your AI Creative Studio
results.content:
Loova AI

Hi everyone, this is Anbang, founder of Loova 👋

Before building Loova Agents, I kept running into the same issue over and over again.

AI video creation is powerful now. But the workflow still feels broken.

People open 20 different tabs just to make one video.

Docs for ideas. GPT for scripts. One tool for images. Another for video. Another for music. Then editing software on top of that.

You go from:  
idea → prompts → images → video → editing

And somewhere in the middle, the creative flow gets lost.

The bigger problem is that most AI tools only help you generate.  
They don’t help you think visually.  
They don’t help you direct.

But most creators are not trained filmmakers. They shouldn’t need to think like prompt engineers just to tell a story. [...] That frustration is what led us to build Loova Agents.

We wanted to create something that behaves more like a creative director than just another AI generator.   
With Loova Agents, the goal is simple:

understand the intent behind your idea

plan scenes before generation

generate visuals and BGM together

keep the whole project inside one infinite canvas

let creators shape stories visually, not tab by tab

People are already using it for product ads, AI short films, talking avatar videos, UGC style content, and more.

We’re still very early. Still learning every day. Still building with the community.

If you try it, I’d genuinely love to hear your thoughts. A lot of what we build next will come directly from user feedback. Here is a quick link to explore: 

SomitraSR from Timidlly [...] Anbang Xu
Loova AI

Loova AI

@abod\_rehman You can use the videos across TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, ads, landing pages, ecommerce stores, client work, and pretty much anywhere else.  
  
Not locked at all. We support exporting videos in standard formats, and we’re also building more editing/export flexibility so creators can continue workflows in tools they already use if they want.

Milo
Loova AI

Loova AI

@abod\_rehman It’s not locked into Loova.

You can export the final video and use it wherever you need — social posts, ads, landing pages, client work, or your own editing workflow.

We want Loova to fit into creators’ existing workflows, not trap the work inside our product.

Nova

## What is URL to Video AI Converter?

AI-powered URL-to-Video tool turns a single product link into a complete, ready-to-use video ad. By analyzing the product page, Loova automatically extracts key information, generates compelling hooks, builds visuals and assembles everything into a high-performing ad creative designed to drive conversions.

Features

## Core Features of AI URL to Video Maker [...] Build Your Ad Asset Library in Loova Ads Studio

### Build Your Ad Asset Library in Loova Ads Studio

Every Product Kit can become the foundation for more than one campaign. Inside Loova Ads Studio, you can use Loova  AI Ad Generator to generate and organize video ads, image ads, product visuals, UGC creatives, and social content in one place.

Steps

## How to Use AI Link to Video Converter?

1

### Paste Product Link

Paste a product URL from Shopify, Amazon, or TikTok Shop. Loova automatically extracts product images, titles, descriptions into a structured Product Kit. Review and edit the information before moving to the next step.
